text.message: r we really feeding red here?
we are trading with whoever is willing
your saltiness is pretty funny, yes
red is dominating and you're handing him exactly what he needs on a silver platter
hes blocking and taking from me
i dont think im handed anything
red, no sense talking to black cause he's not logical
I'm not logical? lol brother you are the one giving 2:1 to the guy dominating
i do what i need to do give myself a chance
the nail is already in the casket so lets just finish quick so we don't waste our time
you literally destroyed your chance by feeding the winner
you simply lack foresight and are a rat chasing the cheese with no awareness of the trap
thats why i don't mind whats happening
you caused it to happen lol
I'm just helping you see that so you can you know.. learn and grow
you can only do that if someone is willing to listen to you
your logic is clearly inconsequential compared to mine
main character syndrome, i get it
blue only a road away from a tie btw
That's an Avengers Infinity War quote actually. My second one that has gone unacknowledged
GREEN IS LIKE 2 ROAD FOR FIRMING LONGEST ROAD
this lobby was not meant for me to win, there was a greater purpose
